_**User (2026-04-16 12:58:21Z)**_

How can I see in VSCode the AI tokens consumption? I want to know how much is left 

_**User (2026-04-16 12:59:20Z)**_

Is there an extension for this control in the case of CoPilot?

---

_**Agent (copilot/gpt-4.1)**_

There is currently no official or third-party VS Code extension that shows GitHub Copilot token or usage consumption directly in the editor. GitHub Copilot operates on a subscription model, not a token
